text: Water Stream - deals damage to the target with a powerful stream of water.
Water Shock - strikes an opponent with a block of water (when it hits the block, the water spills over).
Healing Water - heals the master when he is in the water.
$(o)Condition:$() Within 16 blocks of a water source.
Living Water: When hit, 15% chance to either reduce incoming damage by 75% or restore 40% health.
